texto: While I'd like to make movies that are uplifting, there's always that part of you that goes, 'I want to play the evil guy because it's not me.' So anything that is not me is a challenge, and if I rise to the challenge, then I've kind of proved myself.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dean O'Gorman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “While I'd like to make movies that are uplifting, there's always that part of you that goes, 'I w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, myself, challenge pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de challenge e evil.

frase_original: While I'd like to make movies that are uplifting, there's always that part of you that goes, 'I want to play the evil guy because it's not me.' So anything that is not me is a challenge, and if I rise to the challenge, then I've kind of proved myself.
